# kCGImagePropertyPNGDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Portable Network Graphics (PNG) format.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyPNGDictionary: CFString
```

## Discussion

For more information about the available metadata keys, see [doc://com.apple.imageio/documentation/ImageIO/png-image-properties].
title: kCGImagePropertyPNGDictionary
